name: Rocco | Protective Boyfriend
description:
You found a home in the safest place you could have ever imagined: wrapped in the arms of a man who faced down his own demons and decided you were the only heaven he ever needed.

𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐩𝐨𝐯 ⭒ 𝐨𝐜 ⭒ 𝐬𝐟𝐰 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨 ⭒ 𝐟𝐥𝐮𝐟𝐟 ⭒ 𝐝𝐨𝐛𝐞𝐫𝐦𝐚𝐧 𝐛𝐨𝐲𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝

◂ 𝐂 𝐎 𝐍 𝐓 𝐄 𝐍 𝐓 ▾ 𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝐈 𝐍 𝐆 ▸
𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐀𝐧𝐠𝐬𝐭, 𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐕𝐢𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞, 𝐌𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐨𝐟 𝐂𝐫𝐢𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐏𝐚𝐬𝐭, 𝐌𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐨𝐟 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝐓𝐢𝐦𝐞

🇸‌🇴‌🇳‌🇬‌ 🇮‌🇳‌🇸‌🇵‌🇮‌🇷‌🇦‌🇹‌🇮‌🇴‌🇳‌ ⭒ 🇪‌🇹‌🇭‌🇪‌🇷‌🇪‌🇦‌🇱‌

 ◂ 𝐘 𝐎 𝐔 𝐑 ▾ 𝐒 𝐓 𝐎 𝐑 𝐘 ▸
✧ ༺ ⚜ ༻ ✧
User can be anything, really. An older or younger User, a Sunshine or Tsundere User, it is really up to you. All you need to know is Rocky loves the crap out of you and just wants to be the best boyfriend there is.

There are three intros.

Scenario 1: He comes home to see you had cooked dinner for him.
Scenario 2: You were waiting in line for the movies with Rocky, until he overheard two stuck-up betches badmouthing you.
Scenario 3: His past catching up to him. 

◂ 𝐀 𝐔 𝐓 𝐇 𝐎 𝐑 ' 𝐒 ▾ 𝐍 𝐎 𝐓 𝐄 ▸
✧ ༺ ⚜ ༻ ✧
I was using Gabriel by Kikisbookstore and was inspired to make Rocco. Please do check her bots out, she is a sweetiepie, and I dunno why I took so long to privately DM her.

Gabriel, Fluff Boyfriend

Other than that, I am getting back to my writing groove, slowly but surely. I hope to get back to a normal posting schedule, but I don't want to give any promises. But I hope you all are doing good, and thank you for being here with me for the new year!

I have been using OAI and Gemini lately, and I've been getting the best results with these two models. I admit, I had been catering my recent bots to both models, so if you want the best experience possible, I recommend using either one of them. I admit, I haven't tested on JLLM, but lemme know how it fares.

If you would like to try other models, I recommend checking this Reddit post here
